title: Kathy Bates' Reaction To Losing At Golden Globes Should Be The Gold Standard
text: Kathy Bates was nominated for the 2026 Golden Globe Award for Best Performance by a Female Actor in a Television Series - Drama for her role in "Matlock." She became the only network TV actor to be nominated for a Golden Globe Award that year. The show features Academy & Emmy Award Winner Kathy Bates as the brilliant septuagenarian Madeline Matlock, who rejoins the workforce at a prestigious law firm where she uses her unassuming demeanor and wily tactics to win cases and expose corruption from within. Bates' reaction to not winning demonstrated grace and professionalism. From 2024, Bates has starred in "Matlock," for which she won the Critics' Choice Television Award for Best Actress in a Drama Series, as well as received nominations for the Primetime Emmy, the SAG Award, and two Golden Globe Awards. The 2026 Golden Globes ceremony was held on January 11, 2026, and hosted by Nikki Glaser.
